fixes_applied.description: Function-level docstring was already removed in the current version of the file. The file already has a module-level docstring and no function-level docstring was found.

Extracted inline admin interaction block (subscription pause) into GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription() method. Created helper_additions/gemini_ra_helper_additions.py with the new static method, then replaced the 6-line inline code block with a single helper call: GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription(page, subscription_id)

This violation was resolved by the same fix as V002. The page.click('button[type="submit"]') call was part of the admin interaction block that was extracted into the GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription() method.
Module-level docstring was already present at the top of the file before imports. The file already complies with CHECKPOINT_D01 requirements.

Combined two separate imports from core.settings into a single line. Changed 'from core.settings import framework_logger' and 'from core.settings import GlobalState' (two lines) to 'from core.settings import framework_logger, GlobalState' (one line).

Wrapped all 13 locator definitions in a class Elements: structure. Changed from module-level variable definitions to proper Elements inner class pattern. The locators are now defined as class attributes within 'class Elements:' block, matching the framework's Page Object Model pattern. Property methods already correctly referenced self.elements.X and remain unchanged.

fix_actions_applied: MULTI_FILE_FIX (V002, V003) - Extracted pause_subscription to helper
Created new file with GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription() static method
RESTRUCTURE (V006) - Wrapped 13 locators in Elements class
